comment: The Sump rules metadata (plan 5e: the SVG carries shape, this file carries scoring/mode rules). Consumed by src/game/Scoring.ts and src/game/sump.ts.

waterLevel.comment: S-U-M-P completions raise the level 1..5; the bonus multiplier tracks it. Level 5 arms HIGH WATER. Letters persist across balls, lane change on the flippers.

floodgate.comment: Lit by a SLUICE completion; while lit a centre drain opens the gate and SUMP PLAY begins instead of a ball loss. Consumed on descent; relit at half price (bank walls stay down) after a completed outflow ride.

sumpPlay.comment: Chamber scoring runs at x waterLevel (scoring factor). valveHits hits on the manifold light the RETURN PIPE; riding it pays the outflow ladder and returns the ball to the left inlane. After pumpS in the chamber the pumps spool (DMD warning); at floodS the return lights FREE regardless of valves (the escape is offered, never forced - the chamber gap stays a real drain).

pump.comment: Pump House scoop ladder (wrapping); the top rung spots a valve in the next sump play.

highWater.comment: Wizard: WATER LEVEL 5 + two outflow rides + the pump ladder top light the Pump House; shooting it starts durationS of x scoreFactor with the floodgate locked open.

skill.comment: THE READING (differentiation-pass pattern): a soft plunge peaking in the sensor-skill-reading band (fires at <= maxSpeed m/s) pays points and spots one S-U-M-P lane. Once per ball.

pressureTest.comment: PRESSURE TEST (DMD video mode): topping the pump ladder lights it; the next pump capture holds the ball while a needle sweeps - flip inside the green arc. Timer-driven (sim-safe).
